settings.heading: Warranty & Product Support
settings.intro: Coverage and help for the products you buy from Emporx.

settings.content:
Emporx 30-day limited warranty

Every product purchased from Emporx is covered by a 30-day limited warranty from the date of delivery. This protects you against items that arrive dead on arrival (DOA) or develop a manufacturing defect under normal use during that period. If that happens, we'll make it right with a replacement, repair, or refund — at Emporx's discretion.

Manufacturer warranty

Many electronics also include a separate manufacturer warranty (often 12 months) that may extend beyond our 30-day window. Where one applies, we'll help you understand your coverage and connect you with the manufacturer's support or claims process.

What's covered

  • Dead-on-arrival units
  • Manufacturing or material defects under normal use
  • Functional failures not caused by the customer

What's not covered

  • Accidental damage, drops, liquid or water damage
  • Misuse, neglect, or use outside the product's intended purpose
  • Normal wear and tear, and consumables such as battery capacity loss over time
  • Unauthorized repairs, modifications, or tampering
  • Cosmetic wear that does not affect function

How to make a warranty claim

Contact us at Alvaro.herard@emporx.com or through our Contact page within the warranty period. Please include your order number, a description of the issue, and photos or a short video showing the problem — this helps us resolve your claim quickly.

Product support

Need help with setup, compatibility, or troubleshooting? Our team is happy to assist before and after your purchase — just reach out.

settings.title: Talk to a specialist
settings.text: Real people who know the products and can help you choose or fix.

settings.title: Warranty backed
settings.text: A clear 30-day limited warranty plus manufacturer pass-through.
